subject: Rajasthan
question_en: Which monument is famous for its intricate carvings?
question_hi: राजस्तान मनों में कौने कालाई की कलाई कोड कोड कोड कोड कोड कोड
explanation_en:
Amber Fort (Amber Fort) is a famous monument in Jaipur, Rajasthan, known for its intricate carvings.
The monument dates back to the 16th century and was built by Maharaja Man Singh Tomar.
